product: Enable access requests across your Unity Catalog metastore (Public Preview)
tagline: You can now enable access requests at the Unity Catalog metastore level.
what_it_does: You can now enable access requests at the Unity Catalog metastore level. This feature also lets you set a metastore level destination that's inherited by all catalogs, schemas, and other objects without their own destination. By enabling metastore level access requests, users can request access to objects even when no destination is explicitly configured.
plain_summary: You can now enable access requests at the Unity Catalog metastore level. This feature also lets you set a metastore level destination that's inherited by all catalogs, schemas, and other objects without their own destination.
key_takeaway: You can now enable access requests at the Unity Catalog metastore level.
